title: Berglander Slotted Spoons for Straining 2 pcs 33cm, Stainless Steel Kitchen Spider Strainer Skimmer Ladle for Straining Pasta/Cooking/Frying, Metal Kitchen Utensils Pasta Spoon
features: 2-PIECE STRAINING SET: Includes 1 slotted spoon + 1 spider strainer skimmer ladle; perfect for draining pasta, veggies, dumplings, fries, tempura, and more in boiling water or hot oil.
FOOD-GRADE STAINLESS STEEL: Mirror-polished, rust-resistant, one-piece metal construction—no rivets or joints; durable, hygienic, and dishwasher safe for everyday cooking.
LONG 33cm HANDLES: Extra reach keeps hands farther from steam and splatter; balanced weight for comfortable control when stirring, lifting, and plating from deep pots or fryers.
FAST DRAINING PERFORMANCE: Wide skimmer basket + precision slots reduce carry-over water and oil; ideal kitchen spider for frying, blanching, canning, stock, soup, and seafood boils.
EASY STORAGE & CLEANUP: Smooth, seamless surfaces release residue; hanging loop fits utensil racks and hooks; safe for stainless, cast iron, and most nonstick cookware.
